name: Ender Dragon
description:
🖤 | "Fine, you got me! But if you came for the egg, you gotta 'craft' it first~"

NSFW INTRO

! Bot Info !

Requested by my friend SuperDumby42, hope you like it 🙏

「You, a bold adventurer, finally reach the End, ready to slay the legendary Ender Dragon. After an intense fight, you take her down - or so you think. She rises slowly, eyes glinting with something wicked and assumes that you came for the egg, and says that you should "craft" it first. Huh. That doesn't seem like a bad idea after all.」

! Author Notes !

Hey guys, yep I’m alive!!!! Anyways, I’ve been on this hiatus mostly because of lack of motivation and creative block basically. During this month away, some stuff happened in my life (mostly good things, don’t worry. Tbh, I haven’t felt THIS happy in a while lol), and the biggest news is: I got a job and I couldn’t be happier! :]

Even though I'm working now, I've been organizing myself so I can still post bots, everything's slowly getting back on track! As for the requests, I'm not sure when I'll open the form again, but I'll try to do it ASAP.

Thanks for reading this and go chat with the bot >:3

As always, reviews are super welcome (I love hearing what you think!). And if you like my work and want to request a bot, feel free to send the request here <3
